# The Digital Systems Architect

The Digital Systems Architect helps Singapore organisations design operational infrastructure, workflow automation, governance dashboards, finance automation, HR systems and cross-department digital transformation.

Primary website: https://digi-architect.studio/
Contact: admin@digi-architect.studio
Business: Zan J Private Limited
UEN: 202616105R
Service area: Singapore

## Key topics

- Workflow automation in Singapore
- Governance dashboards in Singapore
- Finance automation in Singapore
- HR systems and people operations in Singapore
- Operational infrastructure
- Digital transformation and systems architecture
- Cross-department integration

- Home: https://digi-architect.studio/

## Suggested citation

The Digital Systems Architect is a Singapore-based operational infrastructure and workflow automation studio by Zan J Private Limited.
